description:
A media streaming client for Plex


Added
- Media detail genres
- Episode action setting
- Specials download toggle
- Plex TV Date Added sort
- Jellyfin episode added sort
Improved
- Android playback timing
- Android subtitle rendering
- Artwork memory usage
- Episode row layout
- Multi-server labels
- Profile session handling
- Tracker session handling
Fixed
- Plex transcode seeking
- Plex transcode reporting
- PGS subtitles while transcoding
- Duplicate seeks
- Early playback completion
- Subtitle startup and cleanup
- External subtitle loading
- Queue spoiler hiding
- Episode spoiler hiding
- Watch-order downloads
- Specials ordering
- Jellyfin trickplay layout
- Library focus
- Android passthrough handling
- Android HDR capability checks
- TV passthrough settings
- Trakt session refreshes
- Fribb ID parsing
- Hidden library profile scoping
- Removed Jellyfin connections
- Live TV timeline heartbeat
Full Changelog: 2.7.1...2.8.0
